---
title: 'Covenant Church - Destrehan, LA'
date: '2012-05-24T05:36:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Church Finder'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3574981161934379887'
blogger_filename: '/2012/05/covenant-church-destrehan-la.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Church Finder/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Louisiana'
---

Covenant Church<br />
Founder - Jesse and Cathy Duplantis<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.mycovenantchurch.com/">http://www.mycovenantchurch.com/</a><br />
<br />
1973 Ormond Boulevard
Destrehan, LA 70047
<br />
<br />
Located near New Orleans, LA
